title: Velvety Italian Phyllo Dough Stir-Fry
description: A crowd-pleasing Tuscan dish that combines velvety flavors and textures with the versatility of phyllo dough for a Mediterranean-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup phyllo dough
ingredients.notes: Preferably pre-made or fresh, thawed if frozen

ingredients.name: 1 can diced tomatoes with basil
ingredients.notes: Choose a mild flavor for better umami profile

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease a baking sheet with olive oil.
Cut phyllo dough into small squares. Brush lightly with olive oil on all sides and place them on the prepared baking sheet.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add chopped onion, minced garlic, and cook until translucent.
Add spinach leaves to the skillet and sauté for about 3-4 minutes or until wilted. Season with salt and pepper.
Pour the can of diced tomatoes into the skillet, including their juices. If using Parmesan cheese, sprinkle it on top evenly. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
Remove phyllo squares from baking sheet and spoon the spinach mixture onto each square. Place back in the oven and bake for about 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Serve hot with lemon juice drizzled over if desired.
